title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability · Policy Recall
summary: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a risk-based lint policy and fixtures after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Recommended Baseline evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Recommended Baseline assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed review case for gates lint correctness that tests this competency: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.text: Order work so Recommended Baseline has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
